# Even Flow
> AI-native email marketing agency. Klaviyo specialists for AU/NZ ecommerce brands.

Even Flow builds and manages email programmes for ecommerce brands using AI.
One brand interview. Your entire email programme built, scheduled, and selling within 7 days.

## Services
- Full Klaviyo setup and management
- Brand Intelligence File (built from a single interview)
- Welcome series and abandonment flows
- Weekly campaigns written in your brand voice
- Live performance dashboard
- A/B testing and weekly optimisation

## Contact
- Website: https://evenflow.agency
- Email: info@evenflow.agency
- Location: Gold Coast, Australia

## Ideal clients
Shopify and ecommerce brands in Australia and New Zealand doing $500k–$10M revenue who want email to drive 30–40% of revenue.
